name: Springans Kitt
name_jp: スプリガンズ・キット
desc: If you have a Fusion Monster that mentions "Fallen of Albaz" as material in your field or GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add to your hand, 1 of your "Branded" Spells/Traps that is banished or in your Deck or GY, then place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Springans Kitt" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you have a Fusion Monster that mentions "Fallen of Albaz" as material in your field or GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add to your hand, 1 of your "Branded" Spells/Traps that is banished or in your Deck or GY, then place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Springans Kitt" once per turn.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
Places cards from the player's hand on the bottom of the Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
